summary: Frontend-only testing for Librarian's Quest iteration 3 (multi-level + boss + protester theme rewrite). All primary flows pass: title -> character select (Maya) -> confirm -> game-screen loads without errors. Level intro overlay renders 'LEVEL 1 / CLASSIC LIBRARY / TARGET: 150 PTS'. HUD shows 'LEVEL 1' and 'PTS TO NEXT' counter. Jump via touch-zone-jump works and score increments. Pause/Resume and Mute controls work. Reaching 150 pts in L1 triggers level-complete-overlay with working next-level-button which advances to LEVEL 2 with a fresh intro ('LEVEL 2 / CLASSIC LIBRARY / TARGET: 300 PTS'). Protester sprite (testID=sprite-protester) renders in world with picket sign. Title screen VS panel shows protester holding a 'BANNED' sign (not the old monster). Code verification: game.tsx contains THEMES (4), getLevelTarget/isBossLevel/getBossHp, advanceLevel, BossProtester import, stepBoss branch, sign/shockwave entity kinds, level/levelComplete state, hudLabel. Sprites.tsx exports BannerEnemy (variant+sign props) and BossProtester (no leftover monster code).

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings in console: 'textShadow*' style props and 'props.pointerEvents' are deprecated. Non-blocking but should migrate to 'textShadow' shorthand and 'style.pointerEvents' in a future iteration.

action_items: (Low priority) Migrate deprecated textShadow*/pointerEvents usages to new API to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: game.tsx is ~950 lines — consider splitting into hooks (useGameLoop, useBossAI, useEntities) and a themes module in future iterations to stay under ~700 LOC per file.
Player-boss contact detection uses a single-frame 'onGround' heuristic (velocityY>0 and playerBottom - velocityY <= top + 14). Tight timing; acceptable but may feel unfair at high speeds.

Distance-based scoring uses Math.floor(scrollX.current) % 10 === 0, which can increment multiple times per frame at higher speeds due to integer truncation. Consider tracking last scored threshold instead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Character select testIDs are 'select-male-librarian-button' / 'select-female-librarian-button' / 'confirm-character-button' (NOT 'character-maya'). To reach Level 1 target (150 pts) via Playwright, tap touch-zone-jump ~60-70 times with ~220ms intervals (takes ~15s). Level complete triggers reliably. L1-L5 all share CLASSIC LIBRARY theme since themes cycle every 5 levels. Boss levels (5/10/15) verified only in code, not runtime — reaching L5 takes several minutes of active play.
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues found. All iteration-3 requirements verified end-to-end.
